'''Alyssia''' was a [[Prince/Legends|princess]] of the [[Hapan Royal House]], a niece of [[Ta'a Chume]], to whom she bore a close physical resemblance. She was also the younger sister of [[Chelik]].

Regard as particularly cunning and ruthless even by the standards of the [[Hapan]] royal family, Alyssia had ambitions to become [[Queen Mother]] of [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]], in pursuit of which she plotted against the families of both her aunt [[Ta'a Chume]] and her sister [[Chelik]].

In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], as the reigning Queen Mother [[Teneniel Djo]] was rapidly losing influence, Alyssia put her plans into action. She won the loyalty of Ta'a Chume's lover and advisor, the male [[courtesan]] [[Trisdin Gheer]], which gave her insights into the plans of the ruling branch of the royal family, and to weaken the rival claim of her elder sister Chelik, she appears to have convinced [[Chelik's daughter]] to attempt the [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] of [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Isolder]].

In the end, her plotting was for naught, as her cousin [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] took the throne.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Alyssia may possibly be a daughter of [[Secciah]], mentioned in the earlier novel ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' as the next-in-line of Ta'a Chume's sisters. In ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'', the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Crimpler]] thinks of Alyssia's lover and agent Trisdin as a "[[Ni'Korish (faction)|Ni'Korish]] traitor". If correct, this would imply that Alyssia was the head of the anti-[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] faction at the Hapan court.
